summary: Tested PDF Generation and Email Integration features for B2B Travel Platform. Backend APIs are fully functional - 11/12 tests passed. PDF generation returns valid PDF documents, email sending via Resend API works correctly, and status change emails are triggered when admin advances booking status. Frontend navigation issue prevents accessing ProposalView from BookingDetail's 'View Quote' button.

minor.issue: Returns 404 instead of 401/403 when no auth token provided (proposal ID checked before auth)

ui_bugs.issue: View Quote button calls onBack() which navigates to dashboard instead of opening ProposalView

issues: Console warnings about HTML hydration errors (span inside tbody/tr/select/option) - these are from Emergent preview environment instrumentation, not actual code issues

action_items: Fix BookingDetail.jsx View Quote button to navigate to ProposalView instead of calling onBack()
critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation endpoint (pdf_generator.py) is well-implemented with WeasyPrint, generates professional PDFs with cover page, itinerary, pricing, and terms
Email service (email_service.py) correctly integrates with Resend API, sends real emails for proposals and booking status changes
Booking status advance (bookings.py line 228) correctly triggers email notification via send_booking_status_email()
ProposalView.jsx has proper email modal with real API integration (line 540 calls api.post('/email/send-proposal'))
PDF download button in ProposalView.jsx (line 1611) correctly calls api.get('/proposals/{id}/pdf')

success_rate.frontend: Partial - navigation issue prevents full ProposalView testing

seed_data_creation: None - used existing bookings and proposals
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF and Email features are fully functional at API level. Backend tests confirm: PDF generation returns valid PDF bytes starting with %PDF-1.3, email sending via Resend returns email_id, status advance triggers email notification. The View Quote button in BookingDetail navigates back instead of opening ProposalView - this is a minor UI navigation bug. Notification bell shows status change notifications correctly.

backend_apis.GET /api/proposals/{id}/pdf: PASSED - Returns valid PDF (application/pdf, starts with %PDF)
backend_apis.POST /api/email/send-proposal: PASSED - Sends real email via Resend, returns email_id
backend_apis.PUT /api/bookings/{id}/status/advance: PASSED - Advances status and triggers email

frontend_ui.My Bookings: PASSED - Shows 2 bookings with status badges and progress trackers
frontend_ui.Booking Detail: PASSED - Shows booking info, status tracker, activity log
frontend_ui.View Quote button: ISSUE - Navigates back instead of opening ProposalView
frontend_ui.Notification Bell: PASSED - Shows notifications including status change alerts

email_integration.Resend API: WORKING - Emails sent successfully (confirmed in backend logs)

mocked_apis_note: None - both PDF and Email are fully functional with real integrations
